view.title: View Deep Space Station {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to retransmit the welcome subspace message?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome subspace transmission has been resent. Check your comm channel.

reverseDns.title: Reverse Navigation Registry Settings
reverseDns.changeWarning: Changes to Reverse Navigation Registry take up to one standard hour to propagate.

ipmiLive.title: IPMI Network Beacon
ipmiLive.description: Issues a live Network Beacon Address to the IPMI controller, restricted to your own beacon and limited to 24 standard hours of use.

order.title: Requisition Deep Space Station
order.hostnameHelp: Use the station designation to identify the deep space station. The sector claim does not need to be valid or registered. One period is required in the designation. Other examples: database.local, web.station or your.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Note: Security Clearance Code must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one numeral, and a special character.
order.autoRenewNotice: The subscription will automatically renew after every standard month at {cost} until decommissioned.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By confirming this box, you acknowledge that you are acquiring a subscription service that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is charged to the Credit Chip you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the fleet portal select the active service and activate the Abort link or transmit to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Federation Terms and Conditions. By confirming the box and activating Place My Requisition below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Federation Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have reviewed the terms above and I agree.
